rules.name: 怨念积蓄
rules.description: 任意回合内，任意友方棋子（含带土自身）受到伤害时，带土获得一层「怨念」（最多3层，每层攻击力+2），带土己方回合结束时清除

rules.name: 诅咒结界规则
rules.description: 每回合限一次，己方回合受到伤害时免疫并将诅咒交给对手

rules.name: 圣盾效果
rules.description: 当拥有圣盾状态时，受到伤害会抵挡一次伤害并移除圣盾效果

rules.name: 圣盾效果

rules.name: 脉冲手枪规则
rules.description: 敌人释放技能前，对范围内随机敌人造成伤害

rules.name: 脉冲手枪（移动触发）

rules.name: 回溯计数（技能）

rules.name: 回溯计数（移动）

rules.name: 回溯（回合结束强制）

rules.name: 粘性炸弹（跟随移动）

rules.name: 粘性炸弹（回合结束爆炸）
rules.description: 对手回合结束时，粘性炸弹爆炸，对曼哈顿距离≤1内所有棋子造成伤害。

rules.name: 收割
rules.description: （被动）造成伤害时，对自己造成伤害量50%的治疗

rules.name: 血之回响规则
rules.description: 当友方单位失去圣盾时，为己方添加圣光充能手牌

anti-heal-block.name: 禁疗阻止
anti-heal-block.description: 阻止被禁疗目标受到治疗
anti-heal-block.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!context.piece) { return { message: '没有目标', success: false }; } let isAntiHeal = false; if (context.piece.statusTags) { for (let i = 0; i < context.piece.statusTags.length; i++) { const tag = context.piece.statusTags[i]; if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'anti-heal') { isAntiHeal = true; break; } if (typeof tag === 'string' && tag.includes('anti-heal')) { isAntiHeal = true; break; } } } if (isAntiHeal) { return { message: context.piece.name + '处于禁疗状态，无法受到治疗', success: false, blocked: true, showUIEffect: true }; } return { message: '目标未处于禁疗状态', success: true }; }

ashbringer.name: 灰烬使者
ashbringer.description: 对一格以内的一个敌人造成自身攻击力100%的真实伤害
ashbringer.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 1, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) { return target; } const damage = caster.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(caster, target, damage, 'true', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: caster.name + '使用灰烬使者对' + target.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点真实伤害', success: true }; }
ashbringer.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '对1格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点真实伤害（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }

basic-attack.name: 基础攻击
basic-attack.description: 选择1格内一个目标，对其造成等同于自身攻击力的伤害
basic-attack.code: function executeSkill(context) { const targetEnemy = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 1, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!targetEnemy || targetEnemy.needsTargetSelection) { return targetEnemy; } // 确保攻击力和威力系数都是有效的数字 const attack = Number(sourcePiece.attack) || 0; const powerMultiplier = Number(context.skill.powerMultiplier) || 1; const damageValue = attack * powerMultiplier; const damageResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, targetEnemy, damageValue, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 造成 ' + damageResult.damage + ' 点伤害', success: true }; }
basic-attack.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damageValue = Math.round(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: "选择1格内一个目标，造成" + damageValue + "点伤害（相当于自身攻击力）", expectedValues: { damage: damageValue } }; }

biotic-grenade.name: 生物手雷
biotic-grenade.description: 选择一个2*2区域的左上角格子（4格距离内），对其中友军回复4点生命值，对敌军造成1点伤害并附加禁疗效果一回合
biotic-grenade.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 4, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } const targetX = targetPosition.x; const targetY = targetPosition.y; const allies = []; const enemies = []; for (let dx = 0; dx < 2; dx++) { for (let dy = 0; dy < 2; dy++) { const p = select.getPieceAt(targetX + dx, targetY + dy); if (p && p.currentHp > 0) { if (p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId) { allies.push(p); } else { enemies.push(p); } } } } let messages = []; if (allies.length > 0) { const hlResult = healDamage(sourcePiece, allies, 4, context.battle, context.skill.id); allies.forEach(function(ally, i) { const r = hlResult.results && hlResult.results[i]; if (r && r.success) { messages.push(ally.name + '回复' + r.heal + '点生命值'); } }); } if (enemies.length > 0) { const dmgResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, enemies, 1, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); enemies.forEach(function(enemy, i) { const r = dmgResult.results && dmgResult.results[i]; if (r && r.success) { const statusId = 'anti-heal-' + Date.now(); addStatusEffectById(enemy.instanceId, { id: statusId, type: 'anti-heal', currentDuration: 1, intensity: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-anti-heal-block'] }); addRuleById(enemy.instanceId, 'rule-anti-heal-block'); addSkillById(enemy.instanceId, 'anti-heal-block'); messages.push(enemy.name + '受到' + r.damage + '点伤害并被禁疗'); } }); } return { message: '生物手雷生效：' + messages.join('，'), success: true }; }
biotic-grenade.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对2*2区域内友军回复4点生命值，对敌军造成1点伤害并附加禁疗效果1回合', expectedValues: { heal: 4, damage: 1 } }; }

blackwidow-deadly-gaze.name: 致命视线
blackwidow-deadly-gaze.description: 对距离自己6格之外的敌方单位造成200%攻击力的伤害。
blackwidow-deadly-gaze.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 99, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var distance = Math.abs(target.x - caster.x) + Math.abs(target.y - caster.y); if (distance <= 6) { return { success: false, message: '目标距离太近，必须选择6格之外的敌人' }; }; var damage = Math.round(caster.attack * context.skill.powerMultiplier); var result = dealDamage(caster, target, damage, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '发动致命视线，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害（距离' + distance + '格）' }; }
blackwidow-deadly-gaze.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对6格之外的敌人造成200%攻击力的伤害', expectedValues: { damage: Math.round(piece.attack * 2) } }; }

blackwidow-lethal-strike.name: 致命打击
blackwidow-lethal-strike.description: 选择一个同行或同列的格子作为方向，向该方向射出一发子弹，对路径上第一个敌人造成(1+间隔格数*0.1)倍攻击力的伤害。被子弹:false的格子拦截。
blackwidow-lethal-strike.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) return targetPos; var dx = targetPos.x - caster.x; var dy = targetPos.y - caster.y; if (dx !== 0 && dy !== 0) { return { success: false, message: '必须选择与自己在同一行或同一列的格子' }; } var dirX = dx === 0 ? 0 : (dx > 0 ? 1 : -1); var dirY = dy === 0 ? 0 : (dy > 0 ? 1 : -1); var firstEnemy = null; var hitDistance = 0; for (var i = 1; i <= 99; i++) { var checkX = caster.x + dirX * i; var checkY = caster.y + dirY * i; var tile = context.battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === checkX && t.y === checkY; }); if (!tile) { break; } if (tile.props && tile.props.bulletPassable === false) { break; } var enemy = context.battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === checkX && p.y === checkY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (enemy) { firstEnemy = enemy; hitDistance = i; break; } } if (!firstEnemy) { return { success: false, message: '路径上没有敌人' }; } var damageMultiplier = 1 + (hitDistance * 0.1); var damage = Math.round(caster.attack * damageMultiplier); var result = dealDamage(caster, firstEnemy, damage, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '对' + firstEnemy.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害（距离' + hitDistance + '格）' }; }
blackwidow-lethal-strike.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '向选择方向发射子弹，对第一个敌人造成(1+距离*0.1)倍伤害', expectedValues: { damage: Math.round(piece.attack * 1.1) } }; }

blackwidow-lethal-toxin.name: 致命毒素
blackwidow-lethal-toxin.description: 在自己当前的格子放置一个毒素，选择距离3以内未被占用的格子并移动到该格子，敌人碰到毒素时受到4点伤害。
blackwidow-lethal-toxin.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; console.log('[LethalToxin] Starting, caster:', caster.name, 'at', caster.x, caster.y); var targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 3, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPos; } var newX = targetPos.x; var newY = targetPos.y; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === newX && t.y === newY; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) { return { success: false, message: '目标位置不可行走' }; } var occupied = battle.pieces.some(function(p) { return p.x === newX && p.y === newY && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (occupied) { return { success: false, message: '目标位置已被占用' }; } var toxinX = caster.x; var toxinY = caster.y; console.log('[LethalToxin] Placing toxin at:', toxinX, toxinY); console.log('[LethalToxin] Moving to:', newX, newY); if (!caster.statusTags) { caster.statusTags = []; } var toxinId = 'lethal-toxin-' + Date.now(); caster.statusTags.push({ id: toxinId, type: 'lethal-toxin', name: '致命毒素', remainingDuration: -1, intensity: 4, value: toxinX, extraValue: toxinY }); console.log('[LethalToxin] Added toxin status to caster, total toxins:', caster.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type === 'lethal-toxin'; }).length); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-blackwidow-toxin-trigger'); caster.x = newX; caster.y = newY; console.log('[LethalToxin] Moved, new position:', caster.x, caster.y); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '在原位置(' + toxinX + ',' + toxinY + ')放置了毒素，并移动到了(' + newX + ',' + newY + ')' }; }
blackwidow-lethal-toxin.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '在当前格子放置毒素，选择距离3以内未被占用的格子移动，敌人触碰毒素受到4点伤害', expectedValues: { damage: 4 } }; }

blackwidow-toxin-damage.name: 毒素伤害
blackwidow-toxin-damage.description: 敌人踩到毒素时受到4点真实伤害
blackwidow-toxin-damage.code: function executeSkill(context) { return { success: true, message: '' }; }
blackwidow-toxin-damage.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '毒素伤害4点', expectedValues: { damage: 4 } }; }

blessed-hammer.name: 祝福之锤
blessed-hammer.description: 对一个两格内敌人造成自身攻击力100%的物理伤害
blessed-hammer.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetEnemy = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 2, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!targetEnemy || targetEnemy.needsTargetSelection) { return targetEnemy; } const damage = sourcePiece.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, targetEnemy, damage, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的祝福之锤对' + targetEnemy.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点物理伤害', success: true }; }
blessed-hammer.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '对两格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点物理伤害（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }

blink.name: 闪烁
blink.description: 选择5×5格范围内一个空地格，传送至该位置
blink.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 2, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var dx = Math.abs(pos.x - caster.x); var dy = Math.abs(pos.y - caster.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) > 2) return { success: false, message: '目标超出闪烁范围（5×5格内）' }; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === pos.x && t.y === pos.y; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) return { success: false, message: '目标位置不可行走' }; var pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (pieceAtPos) return { success: false, message: '目标位置已被占用' }; caster.x = pos.x; caster.y = pos.y; return { success: true, message: caster.name + '闪烁至(' + pos.x + ',' + pos.y + ')' }; }

blizzard-damage.name: 暴风雪伤害
blizzard-damage.description: 对暴风雪区域内的所有敌人造成伤害和冰冻

blizzard.name: 暴风雪
blizzard.description: 选择全局任意一个格子，以该格子为中心创造3*3格的暴风雪区域，对方的回合结束时对其中所有敌人造成当前攻击力1.5倍的伤害和1回合冰冻

blood-echo-trigger.name: 血之回响触发
blood-echo-trigger.description: 失去圣盾时触发，添加圣光充能手牌
blood-echo-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] context:', JSON.stringify({ statusId: context.statusId, hasSourcePiece: !!context.sourcePiece, hasPiece: !!context.piece, playerId: context.playerId })); if (context.statusId !== 'divine-shield') return { success: false, message: '不是圣盾状态' }; const sourcePiece = context.sourcePiece || context.piece; if (!sourcePiece) return { success: false, message: '没有sourcePiece' }; console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece.name, 'ownerPlayerId:', sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId); const liadrin = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'liadrin' && p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!liadrin) return { success: false, message: '没有找到莉亚德琳' }; console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] found liadrin:', liadrin.name); const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; }); if (player) { console.log('[blood-echo-trigger] adding holy-charge to player:', player.playerId); addCardToHand('holy-charge', player.playerId); return { success: true, message: '血之回响：获得1张圣光充能' }; } return { success: false, message: '没有找到玩家' }; }

blood-echo.name: 血之回响

bone-prison.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对距离6以内的一名角色使用，使其无法移动2回合', expectedValues: {} }; }

death-blossom.name: 死亡绽放
death-blossom.description: 对三格内所有的敌人造成200%攻击力的伤害
death-blossom.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const damageValue = Math.round(sourcePiece.attack * context.skill.powerMultiplier); const enemiesInRange = getAllEnemiesInRange(3); if (enemiesInRange.length === 0) { return { message: '范围内没有敌人', success: false }; } const unblocked = []; for (const enemy of enemiesInRange) { const dx = enemy.x - sourcePiece.x; const dy = enemy.y - sourcePiece.y; const stepX = dx === 0 ? 0 : dx > 0 ? 1 : -1; const stepY = dy === 0 ? 0 : dy > 0 ? 1 : -1; let currentX = sourcePiece.x + stepX; let currentY = sourcePiece.y + stepY; let blocked = false; while (currentX !== enemy.x || currentY !== enemy.y) { const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === currentX && t.y === currentY); if (!tile || tile.props.bullet === false) { blocked = true; break; } const pieceInPath = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === currentX && p.y === currentY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== enemy.instanceId); if (pieceInPath) { blocked = true; break; } currentX += stepX; currentY += stepY; } if (!blocked) { const enemyPiece = battle.pieces.find(p => p.instanceId === enemy.instanceId); if (enemyPiece) unblocked.push(enemyPiece); } } if (unblocked.length === 0) { return { message: '所有敌人都被障碍物或棋子遮挡', success: false }; } const result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, unblocked, damageValue, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); const killedCount = result.results.filter(r => r.isKilled).length; const hitMessages = unblocked.map((e, i) => e.name + '受到' + (result.results[i] ? result.results[i].damage : 0) + '点伤害'); let message = sourcePiece.name + '释放死亡绽放，' + hitMessages.join('，'); if (killedCount > 0) { message += '，击杀了' + killedCount + '个敌人'; } return { message: message, success: true }; }
death-blossom.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damageValue = Math.round(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: '对3格内所有未被遮挡的敌人造成' + damageValue + '点伤害（相当于攻击力200%）', expectedValues: { damage: damageValue } }; }

divine-blessing-damage.name: 赐福增伤
divine-blessing-damage.description: 赐福状态下下一次造成的伤害+4
divine-blessing-damage.code: function executeSkill(context) { const attacker = context.piece; if (!attacker) { return { message: '没有攻击者', success: false }; } let hasDivineBlessing = false; let blessingIntensity = 4; if (attacker.statusTags) { for (let i = 0; i < attacker.statusTags.length; i++) { const tag = attacker.statusTags[i]; if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'divine-blessing-buff') { hasDivineBlessing = true; if (tag.intensity) { blessingIntensity = tag.intensity; } break; } } } if (hasDivineBlessing && context.damage) { context.damage = context.damage + blessingIntensity; if (typeof removeStatusEffectById === 'function') { removeStatusEffectById(attacker.instanceId, 'divine-blessing-buff'); } if (typeof removeRuleById === 'function') { removeRuleById(attacker.instanceId, 'rule-divine-blessing'); } if (typeof removeSkillById === 'function') { removeSkillById(attacker.instanceId, 'divine-blessing-damage'); } return { message: attacker.name + '的赐福使伤害+' + blessingIntensity + '，赐福效果消失', success: true }; } return { message: '未处于赐福状态', success: false }; }

divine-blessing.name: 赐福
divine-blessing.description: 所有友方棋子下一次造成伤害时，伤害增加4点
divine-blessing.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); allies.forEach(function(ally) { if (typeof addStatusEffectById === 'function') { addStatusEffectById(ally.instanceId, { id: 'divine-blessing-buff', type: 'divine-blessing-buff', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: 1, intensity: 4, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-divine-blessing'] }); } if (typeof addRuleById === 'function') { addRuleById(ally.instanceId, 'rule-divine-blessing'); } }); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '为所有友方棋子赐福，下一次伤害增加4点', success: true }; }
divine-blessing.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '所有友方棋子下一次造成伤害时，伤害增加4点', expectedValues: { damageBonus: 4 } }; }

divine-shield-defense.name: 圣盾防御
divine-shield-defense.description: 当拥有圣盾状态时，抵挡一次伤害并移除圣盾效果
divine-shield-defense.code: function executeSkill(context) { const piece = context.piece; const damage = context.damage; let hasDivineShield = false; if (piece.statusTags) { hasDivineShield = piece.statusTags.some(tag => tag.type === 'divine-shield'); } if (!hasDivineShield) { return { success: true, blocked: false, message: '' }; } if (!damage || damage <= 0) { return { success: true, blocked: false, message: '没有伤害需要抵挡' }; } if (typeof removeStatusEffectById === 'function') { removeStatusEffectById(piece.instanceId, 'divine-shield'); } if (typeof removeRuleById === 'function') { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-divine-shield'); } if (typeof removeSkillById === 'function') { removeSkillById(piece.instanceId, 'divine-shield-defense'); } const attacker = context.target ? context.target.name : '未知敌人'; return { success: true, blocked: true, message: piece.name + '的圣盾破裂，抵挡了来自于' + attacker + '的伤害' }; }

earthshatter.name: 毁天灭地
earthshatter.description: 选择一个无遮挡和棋子的格子，从天而降降落到该格子并对以该格子为中心的3*3区域的敌人造成100%攻击力的物理伤害
earthshatter.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Skill executing'); console.log('[Earthshatter] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece.name, 'at', sourcePiece.x, sourcePiece.y); const targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 10, filter: 'all' }); console.log('[Earthshatter] targetPos:', targetPos); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Needs target selection or no target'); return targetPos; } console.log('[Earthshatter] Checking piece at target position'); const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetPos.x && p.y === targetPos.y && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { console.log('[Earthshatter] Position occupied by:', pieceAtPos.name); return { message: '该位置已有棋子', success: false }; } console.log('[Earthshatter] Moving sourcePiece to', targetPos.x, targetPos.y); sourcePiece.x = targetPos.x; sourcePiece.y = targetPos.y; console.log('[Earthshatter] sourcePiece new position:', sourcePiece.x, sourcePiece.y); const damageValue = sourcePiece.attack * context.skill.powerMultiplier; console.log('[Earthshatter] Damage value:', damageValue); const affectedEnemies = []; for (let dx = -1; dx <= 1; dx++) { for (let dy = -1; dy <= 1; dy++) { const checkPos = { x: targetPos.x + dx, y: targetPos.y + dy }; const enemyAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === checkPos.x && p.y === checkPos.y && p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId); if (enemyAtPos) { affectedEnemies.push(enemyAtPos); } } } if (affectedEnemies.length > 0) { const result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, affectedEnemies, damageValue, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 从天而降，对 ' + affectedEnemies.map(e => e.name).join(', ') + ' 造成 ' + result.totalDamage + ' 点伤害', success: true }; } return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 从天而降', success: true }; }
earthshatter.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damageValue = Math.round(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: '选择一个安全位置降落，对3*3区域内的敌人造成' + damageValue + '点伤害（相当于攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damageValue, area: '3*3' } }; }

elune-blessing.name: 月神赐福
elune-blessing.description: 为己方添加1张圣光手牌（随机：惩击/治疗/充能），并使下1张使用的圣光手牌效果+50%
elune-blessing.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (!player) { return { success: false, message: '找不到玩家' }; } const cardPool = ['holy-smite', 'holy-heal', 'holy-charge']; const randomCard = cardPool[Math.floor(Math.random() * cardPool.length)]; addCardToHand(randomCard, player.playerId); if (!player.buffs) player.buffs = {}; player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'] = { multiplier: 1.5, uses: 1 }; return { message: caster.name + '获得月神赐福，添加1张圣光手牌，下张手牌效果+50%', success: true }; }
elune-blessing.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '获得1张随机圣光手牌，下张手牌效果+50%', expectedValues: {} }; }

elune-guidance-trigger.name: 艾露恩的指引触发
elune-guidance-trigger.description: 使用圣光手牌时触发，累积月华层数
elune-guidance-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const cardId = context.cardId; if (!cardId) return { success: false, message: '没有卡牌ID' }; if (!cardId.startsWith('holy-')) return { success: false, message: '不是圣光手牌' }; const playerId = context.playerId; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === playerId; }); if (!player) return { success: false, message: '找不到玩家' }; const tyrande = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'tyrande' && p.ownerPlayerId === playerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!tyrande) return { success: false, message: '泰兰德不在场' }; const moonGlow = tyrande.statusTags ? tyrande.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.id === 'moon-glow'; }) : null; let currentStacks = moonGlow ? moonGlow.stacks : 0; currentStacks++; if (currentStacks >= 2) { const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === playerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (allies.length > 0) { const target = allies.sort(function(a, b) { return a.currentHp - b.currentHp; })[0]; healDamage(tyrande, target, 5, battle, 'elune-guidance'); if (moonGlow) { removeStatusEffectById(tyrande.instanceId, 'moon-glow'); } return { success: true, message: '艾露恩的指引：月华满层，为' + target.name + '恢复5点生命' }; } } else { addStatusEffectById(tyrande.instanceId, { id: 'moon-glow', name: '月华', type: 'buff', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: currentStacks, maxStacks: 2 }); return { success: true, message: '艾露恩的指引：获得' + currentStacks + '层月华' }; } return { success: false }; }

elune-guidance.name: 艾露恩的指引
elune-guidance.description: 被动：每当己方使用圣光手牌时，获得1层月华（最多2层）。月华达到2层时，为生命值最低的友方恢复5点生命
elune-guidance.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-elune-guidance'); return { success: true }; }

elune-protection-trigger.name: 艾露恩的守护触发
elune-protection-trigger.description: 受到致命伤害时免疫并恢复生命
elune-protection-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const targetPiece = context.piece; const damage = context.damage; if (!targetPiece) return { success: false, message: '没有目标' }; if (!damage || damage <= 0) return { success: false, message: '没有伤害' }; if (targetPiece.currentHp > damage) return { success: false, message: '不是致命伤害' }; const tyrande = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.templateId === 'tyrande' && p.faction === targetPiece.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!tyrande) return { success: false, message: '泰兰德不在场' }; const protectedFlag = targetPiece.statusTags ? targetPiece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.id === 'elune-protection-used'; }) : null; if (protectedFlag) return { success: false, message: '已经触发过守护' }; addStatusEffectById(targetPiece.instanceId, { id: 'elune-protection-used', name: '艾露恩已守护', type: 'buff', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: -1 }); healDamage(tyrande, targetPiece, 5, battle, 'elune-protection'); return { success: true, blocked: true, message: '艾露恩的守护：' + targetPiece.name + '免疫致命伤害并恢复5点生命' }; }

elune-protection.name: 艾露恩的守护
elune-protection.description: 被动：每当友方单位受到致命伤害时，使其免疫该伤害并恢复5点生命。每名友方每场战斗只能触发1次
elune-protection.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; addPlayerRuleById(caster.ownerPlayerId, 'rule-elune-protection-player'); return { success: true }; }

evil-explosion.name: 邪爆
evil-explosion.description: 消灭距离5以内一个生命值小于等于2的角色，对目标距离2格内的角色造成目标生命值上限1/3的伤害（向下取整且至少为攻击力）
evil-explosion.code: function executeSkill(context) { const targetEnemy = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 5, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!targetEnemy || targetEnemy.needsTargetSelection) { return targetEnemy; } if (targetEnemy.currentHp > 2) { return { message: '目标生命值大于2，无法使用邪爆', success: false }; } const baseDamage = Math.max(sourcePiece.attack, Math.floor(targetEnemy.maxHp / 3)); const nearbyPieces = context.battle.pieces.filter(piece => { if (piece.instanceId === targetEnemy.instanceId) return false; const distance = Math.abs(piece.x - targetEnemy.x) + Math.abs(piece.y - targetEnemy.y); return distance <= 2; }); dealDamage(sourcePiece, nearbyPieces, baseDamage, 'magical', context.battle, context.skill.id); targetEnemy.currentHp = 0; return { message: sourcePiece.templateId + '使用邪爆消灭了' + targetEnemy.templateId + '，并对周围造成伤害', success: true }; }
evil-explosion.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '消灭距离5以内一个生命值小于等于2的角色，对目标周围2格内的角色造成伤害', expectedValues: {} }; }

fel-blessing.name: 邪能赐福
fel-blessing.description: 使一个10格内友方棋子获得2点攻击力并受到4点伤害

fireball.name: 火球术
fireball.description: 对5格内一个敌人造成当前攻击力1.5倍的伤害

freeze-prevent.name: 冰冻阻止
freeze-prevent.description: 阻止被冰冻目标的移动和使用技能

frostbolt.name: 冰霜箭
frostbolt.description: 对5格内一个敌人造成当前攻击力的伤害和1回合冰冻

grant-lucky-coin.name: 发放幸运币
grant-lucky-coin.description: 战斗开始时，该阵营玩家获得一张幸运币手牌
grant-lucky-coin.code: function executeSkill(context) { try { console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] context.playerId:', context.playerId); var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId.toLowerCase() === context.playerId.toLowerCase(); }); if (!player) { console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] Player not found'); return { success: false, message: 'Player not found' }; } console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] Found player:', player.playerId); var result = addCardToHand('lucky-coin', player.playerId); console.log('[grant-lucky-coin] addCardToHand result:', result); return { success: result, message: (player.name || player.playerId) + ' 获得了幸运币' }; } catch (e) { console.error('[grant-lucky-coin] Error:', e); return { success: false, message: 'Error: ' + e.message }; } }

hand-cannon.name: 手炮
hand-cannon.description: 对一个两格内敌人造成1点物理伤害
hand-cannon.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetEnemy = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 2, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!targetEnemy || targetEnemy.needsTargetSelection) { return targetEnemy; } const distance = Math.abs(sourcePiece.x - targetEnemy.x) + Math.abs(sourcePiece.y - targetEnemy.y); if (distance > 2) { return { message: '目标距离太远', success: false }; } const damageValue = 1; const damageResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, targetEnemy, damageValue, 'physical', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 使用手炮对 ' + targetEnemy.name + ' 造成 ' + damageResult.damage + ' 点伤害', success: damageResult.success }; }
hand-cannon.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对两格内的敌人造成1点物理伤害', expectedValues: { damage: 1, range: 2 } }; }

hardy-block-trigger.name: 悍猛格挡效果
hardy-block-trigger.description: 受到伤害时将50%伤害转化为攻击力
hardy-block-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { const battle = context.battle; const piece = context.piece; const damage = context.damage; const hardyBlockTag = piece.statusTags && piece.statusTags.find(function(tag) { return tag.type === 'hardy-block'; }); if (!hardyBlockTag) { removeRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-hardy-block'); return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (!damage || damage <= 0) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } const attackGain = Math.floor(damage * 0.5); if (attackGain > 0) { piece.attack += attackGain; } return { success: true, message: piece.name + ' 的悍猛格挡生效，将 ' + damage + ' 点伤害的50%转化为 ' + attackGain + ' 点攻击力，当前攻击力为 ' + piece.attack }; }

hardy-block.name: 悍猛格挡
hardy-block.description: 如果受到伤害，将伤害的50%转化为攻击力（向下取整），持续2回合
hardy-block.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[HardyBlock] Skill executing'); const sourcePiece = context.piece; console.log('[HardyBlock] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece.instanceId, sourcePiece.name); console.log('[HardyBlock] Calling addStatusEffectById'); addStatusEffectById(sourcePiece.instanceId, { id: 'hardy-block', type: 'hardy-block', currentDuration: 2, currentUses: -1, intensity: 50, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-hardy-block'] }); console.log('[HardyBlock] Calling addRuleById'); addRuleById(sourcePiece.instanceId, 'rule-hardy-block'); console.log('[HardyBlock] Skill execution complete'); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 激活了悍猛格挡，持续2回合，受到伤害时将50%伤害转化为攻击力', success: true }; }
hardy-block.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '在接下来的敌方回合，受到伤害时将50%伤害转化为攻击力（向下取整）', expectedValues: { duration: 2 } }; }

hellfire-shotgun.name: 地狱火霰弹枪
hellfire-shotgun.description: 选择一个格子，对相对方向发出一次攻击，对路径上第一个目标造成攻击力+(5-x)点伤害（x为距离）
hellfire-shotgun.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 5, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } const dx = targetPosition.x - sourcePiece.x; const dy = targetPosition.y - sourcePiece.y; if (dx !== 0 && dy !== 0) { return { message: '必须选择同行或同列的格子', success: false }; } let dirX = 0, dirY = 0; if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) { dirX = dx > 0 ? 1 : -1; } else { dirY = dy > 0 ? 1 : -1; } let currentX = sourcePiece.x + dirX; let currentY = sourcePiece.y + dirY; let distance = 1; let hitPiece = null; while (currentX >= 0 && currentX < battle.map.width && currentY >= 0 && currentY < battle.map.height) { const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === currentX && t.y === currentY); if (!tile || tile.props.bullet === false) { return { message: '攻击被障碍物阻挡', success: false }; } const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === currentX && p.y === currentY && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { hitPiece = pieceAtPos; break; } currentX += dirX; currentY += dirY; distance++; if (distance > 5) break; } if (!hitPiece) { return { message: '路径上没有目标', success: false }; } const damageValue = sourcePiece.attack + (5 - distance); const damageResult = dealDamage(sourcePiece, hitPiece, damageValue, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '使用地狱火霰弹枪对' + hitPiece.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点伤害（距离' + distance + '格）', success: true }; }
hellfire-shotgun.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择方向发射攻击，对路径上第一个目标造成攻击力+(5-距离)点伤害，距离越近伤害越高', expectedValues: { damage: piece.attack + 4 } }; }

hidan-blood-oath.name: 血誓仪式
hidan-blood-oath.description: 对4格内目标施加「血誓诅咒」持续3回合：飞段受到的任何伤害（含自伤）同时作为真实伤害施加给目标
hidan-blood-oath.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 4, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var alreadyOathed = target.statusTags && target.statusTags.some(function(t) { return t.type === 'blood-oath'; }); if (alreadyOathed) return { success: false, message: target.name + '已处于血誓诅咒中' }; addStatusEffectById(target.instanceId, { id: 'blood-oath-' + target.instanceId, name: '血誓诅咒', type: 'blood-oath', currentDuration: 3, currentUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1 }); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-hidan-blood-oath-reflect'); addRuleById(target.instanceId, 'rule-blood-oath-tick'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '对' + target.name + '施加了血誓诅咒（持续3回合），飞段受到的所有伤害将同时施加给目标' }; }
hidan-blood-oath.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对4格内目标施加血誓诅咒（3回合），飞段受到的伤害同时作为真实伤害施加给目标', expectedValues: {} }; }

hidan-sacrifice.name: 狂信者献祭
hidan-sacrifice.description: 飞段对自身造成10点真实伤害；若血誓诅咒激活，诅咒目标同时受到10点真实伤害
hidan-sacrifice.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var result = dealDamage(caster, caster, 10, 'true', context.battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '发动狂信者献祭，对自身造成' + result.damage + '点真实伤害' }; }
hidan-sacrifice.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '对自身造成10点真实伤害；若血誓激活则诅咒目标同时受到10点真实伤害', expectedValues: { selfDamage: 10 } }; }

hidan-undying.name: 不死神体
hidan-undying.description: 受到致命伤害时，HP强制保留1点并进入「濒死」状态；濒死状态持续1回合，结束后才真正死亡（一战仅触发一次）
hidan-undying.code: function executeSkill(context) { return { success: true, message: '' }; }

holy-blast.name: 圣光爆破
holy-blast.description: 在自己有圣盾时，对一个一格以内的一个敌人造成自身攻击力100%的真实伤害并击退两格
holy-blast.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const hasDivineShield = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.some(tag => tag.id === 'divine-shield'); if (!hasDivineShield) { return { success: false, message: '需要拥有圣盾才能使用此技能' }; } const target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 1, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) { return target; } const damage = caster.attack; const damageResult = dealDamage(caster, target, damage, 'true', battle, context.skill.id); removeStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, 'divine-shield'); let pushMessage = ''; const dx = target.x - caster.x; const dy = target.y - caster.y; let pushX = 0, pushY = 0; if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) { pushX = dx > 0 ? 1 : -1; } else { pushY = dy > 0 ? 1 : -1; } let finalX = target.x; let finalY = target.y; for (let i = 0; i < 2; i++) { const nextX = finalX + pushX; const nextY = finalY + pushY; const mapWidth = battle.map.width || 10; const mapHeight = battle.map.height || 10; if (nextX < 0 || nextX >= mapWidth || nextY < 0 || nextY >= mapHeight) { break; } const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === nextX && t.y === nextY); if (!tile || tile.props.walkable === false) { break; } const occupied = battle.pieces && battle.pieces.some(p => p.x === nextX && p.y === nextY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== target.instanceId); if (occupied) { break; } finalX = nextX; finalY = nextY; } if (finalX !== target.x || finalY !== target.y) { target.x = finalX; target.y = finalY; pushMessage = '并将其击退到(' + finalX + ',' + finalY + ')'; } return { message: caster.name + '使用圣光爆破对' + target.name + '造成' + damageResult.damage + '点真实伤害' + pushMessage, success: true }; }
holy-blast.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damage = piece.attack; return { description: '消耗自己的圣盾，对1格内一个敌人造成' + damage + '点真实伤害并击退2格（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: damage } }; }

holy-charge-damage.name: 圣光充能伤害加成
holy-charge-damage.description: 拥有圣光充能buff的棋子造成伤害时，伤害+2
holy-charge-damage.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var buff = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.find(function(tag) { return tag.id === 'holy-charge-buff'; }); if (!buff) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (context.damage !== undefined && context.damage > 0) { context.damage += buff.intensity || 2; buff.remainingUses = (buff.remainingUses || 1) - 1; if (buff.remainingUses <= 0) { removeStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, 'holy-charge-buff'); removeRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-holy-charge'); } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的圣光充能触发，伤害+' + (buff.intensity || 2) }; } return { success: false, message: '' }; }

holy-light-descend.name: 圣光降临
holy-light-descend.description: 选择一个距离6或以内的地格，对该格内的友军回复7点生命值，对该格内敌人造成7点伤害；对该格距离1的地格，伤害和治疗量为4；对该格距离2的地格，伤害和治疗量为2
holy-light-descend.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetCell = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 6 }); if (!targetCell || targetCell.needsTargetSelection) { return targetCell; } const battle = context.battle; const centerX = targetCell.x; const centerY = targetCell.y; const getPiecesAtDist = function(dist) { return battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0 && Math.abs(p.x - centerX) + Math.abs(p.y - centerY) === dist; }); }; const applyRing = function(pieces, value) { const allies = pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; }); const enemies = pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; }); if (allies.length > 0) healDamage(sourcePiece, allies, value, battle, context.skill.id); if (enemies.length > 0) dealDamage(sourcePiece, enemies, value, 'magical', battle, context.skill.id); }; applyRing(getPiecesAtDist(0), 7); applyRing(getPiecesAtDist(1), 4); applyRing(getPiecesAtDist(2), 2); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '释放了圣光降临', success: true }; }
holy-light-descend.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择一个距离6或以内的地格，对该格内的友军回复7点生命值，对该格内敌人造成7点伤害；对该格距离1的地格，伤害和治疗量为4；对该格距离2的地格，伤害和治疗量为2', expectedValues: { centerHeal: 7, centerDamage: 7, adjacentHeal: 4, adjacentDamage: 4, distantHeal: 2, distantDamage: 2 } }; }

holy-shield-defense.name: 圣盾防御
holy-shield-defense.description: 当拥有圣盾状态时，抵挡一次伤害并移除圣盾效果
holy-shield-defense.code: function executeSkill(context) { const piece = context.piece; const damage = context.damage; if (typeof removeStatusEffectById === 'function') { removeStatusEffectById(piece.instanceId, 'holy-shield'); } return { message: piece.name + '的圣盾抵挡了' + damage + '点伤害', success: true }; }

illidan-blade-dash.name: 战刃挥刺
illidan-blade-dash.description: 选择一个正方向（同行或同列）6格以内的地格，冲刺至目标位置并对路径上所有敌人造成自身攻击力100%的物理伤害
illidan-blade-dash.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 6, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) return targetPos; if (caster.x !== targetPos.x && caster.y !== targetPos.y) { return { message: '目标格子必须在同一行或同一列（正方向）', success: false }; } var dx = targetPos.x !== caster.x ? (targetPos.x > caster.x ? 1 : -1) : 0; var dy = targetPos.y !== caster.y ? (targetPos.y > caster.y ? 1 : -1) : 0; var dist = Math.abs(targetPos.x - caster.x) + Math.abs(targetPos.y - caster.y); var enemies = []; var finalX = caster.x; var finalY = caster.y; for (var i = 1; i <= dist; i++) { var cx = caster.x + dx * i; var cy = caster.y + dy * i; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === cx && t.y === cy; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) { break; } var occupant = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === cx && p.y === cy && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (occupant) { if (occupant.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId) { enemies.push(occupant); } break; } finalX = cx; finalY = cy; } if (finalX === caster.x && finalY === caster.y) { return { success: false, message: '路径被阻挡，无法冲刺' }; } caster.x = finalX; caster.y = finalY; if (enemies.length > 0) { var result = dealDamage(caster, enemies, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '战刃挥刺，冲向目标位置并对' + enemies.map(function(e) { return e.name; }).join('、') + '造成' + result.totalDamage + '点伤害' }; } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '战刃挥刺冲向目标位置' }; }
illidan-blade-dash.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '冲刺至正方向6格内的目标位置，对路径上所有敌人造成' + piece.attack + '点物理伤害（攻击力100%）', expectedValues: { damage: piece.attack } }; }

illidan-eye-beam.name: 眼棱
illidan-eye-beam.description: 选择一个距离4以内的敌方棋子，对其造成自身攻击力100%的魔法伤害，并回复等量的生命值
illidan-eye-beam.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 4, filter: 'enemy' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) return target; var dmgResult = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'magical', battle, context.skill.id); var actualDamage = dmgResult.damage || 0; var healResult = healDamage(caster, caster, actualDamage, battle, context.skill.id); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '释放眼棱，对' + target.name + '造成' + actualDamage + '点伤害并回复' + healResult.heal + '点生命值' }; }

illidan-metamorphosis.name: 恶魔变形
illidan-metamorphosis.description: 消耗3点充能，获得2点攻击力，失去1点防御力，并获得技能「恶魔冲击」（可对任意敌人造成等同于攻击力的伤害，共2次）
illidan-metamorphosis.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; caster.attack = (caster.attack || 0) + 2; caster.defense = Math.max(0, (caster.defense || 0) - 1); addStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, { id: 'demon-strike-charges', name: '恶魔冲击次数', type: 'demon-strike-charges', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: 2, intensity: 2, stacks: 1 }); addSkillById(caster.instanceId, 'illidan-demon-strike'); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-illidan-demon-strike'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '进入恶魔变形！攻击力+2（现为' + caster.attack + '），防御力-1（现为' + caster.defense + '），获得恶魔冲击技能（2次）' }; }
illidan-metamorphosis.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '消耗3充能：攻击力+2，防御力-1，获得恶魔冲击（2次）', expectedValues: { attackGain: 2, defenseChange: -1 } }; }

light-extraction.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const target = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 99, filter: 'ally' }); if (!target || target.needsTargetSelection) { return target; } const hasDivineShield = target.statusTags && target.statusTags.some(tag => tag.id === 'divine-shield'); if (!hasDivineShield) { return { success: false, message: '目标没有圣盾' }; } removeStatusEffectById(target.instanceId, 'divine-shield'); const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (player) { addCardToHand('holy-smite', player.playerId); addCardToHand('holy-heal', player.playerId); } return { message: caster.name + '萃取了' + target.name + '的圣盾，获得2张圣光手牌', success: true }; }
light-extraction.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择一个有圣盾的友方，移除圣盾，获得圣光惩击和圣光治疗各1张', expectedValues: {} }; }

light-of-the-light.name: 圣光闪耀

light-of-the-light.code: function executeSkill(context) { const sourcePiece = context.piece; const targetAlly = selectTarget({ type: 'piece', range: 7, filter: 'ally' }); if (!targetAlly || targetAlly.needsTargetSelection) { return targetAlly; } const healValue = 5; const healResult = healDamage(sourcePiece, targetAlly, healValue, context.battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '为' + targetAlly.name + '回复' + healResult.heal + '点生命值', success: true }; }

muru-lament.name: 穆鲁的哀鸣
muru-lament.description: 自动释放所有圣光手牌（不耗AP），每释放1张对所有敌人造成3点真实伤害、为友方恢复2点生命。若释放3张以上，所有友方获得圣盾
muru-lament.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); const holyCards = player.hand.filter(function(c) { return c.cardId && c.cardId.startsWith('holy-'); }); const cardCount = holyCards.length; if (cardCount === 0) { return { success: false, message: '没有圣光手牌' }; } holyCards.forEach(function(card) { discardCard(card.instanceId); }); const enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0; }); const dmgResult = dealDamage(caster, enemies, 3 * cardCount, 'true', battle, 'muru-lament'); const totalDamage = dmgResult.totalDamage || 0; const hlResult = healDamage(caster, allies, 2 * cardCount, battle, 'muru-lament'); const totalHeal = hlResult.totalHeal || 0; if (cardCount >= 3) { allies.forEach(function(ally) { addStatusEffectById(ally.instanceId, { id: 'divine-shield', type: 'divine-shield', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-divine-shield'] }); addRuleById(ally.instanceId, 'rule-divine-shield'); }); } return { message: caster.name + '释放穆鲁的哀鸣！弃置' + cardCount + '张圣光手牌，对所有敌人造成' + totalDamage + '点伤害，友方恢复' + totalHeal + '生命' + (cardCount >= 3 ? '，全体获得圣盾！' : ''), success: true }; }
muru-lament.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '释放所有圣光手牌，每张对敌造成3伤害、友方回2血，3张以上全体圣盾', expectedValues: {} }; }

nano-boost-damage.name: 纳米激素增伤
nano-boost-damage.description: 纳米激素状态下造成的所有伤害+1
nano-boost-damage.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!context.sourcePiece) { return { message: '没有来源棋子', success: false }; } let hasNanoBoost = false; if (context.sourcePiece.statusTags) { for (let i = 0; i < context.sourcePiece.statusTags.length; i++) { const tag = context.sourcePiece.statusTags[i]; if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'nano-boost') { hasNanoBoost = true; break; } if (typeof tag === 'string' && tag.includes('nano-boost')) { hasNanoBoost = true; break; } } } if (hasNanoBoost && context.damage) { const boostedDamage = context.damage + 1; return { message: context.sourcePiece.name + '的纳米激素使伤害+1', success: true, damage: boostedDamage }; } return { message: '目标未处于纳米激素状态', success: false }; }

nano-boost.name: 纳米激素

obito-kamui.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var alreadyShielded = caster.statusTags && caster.statusTags.some(function(t) { return t.type === 'kamui-shield'; }); if (alreadyShielded) return { success: false, message: caster.name + '已处于神威护盾中' }; addStatusEffectById(caster.instanceId, { id: 'kamui-shield', name: '神威护盾', type: 'kamui-shield', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: 1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1 }); addRuleById(caster.instanceId, 'rule-obito-kamui-block'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '激活神威，转移至异次元空间！下一次受到的伤害将被完全吸收并反弹' }; }

obito-space-time.name: 神威·时空跳跃
obito-space-time.description: 消耗3点充能，传送至地图任意空地，对落点周围2格内所有敌方棋子造成攻击力120%的真实伤害
obito-space-time.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var tile = battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === pos.x && t.y === pos.y; }); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) return { success: false, message: '目标位置不可行走' }; var pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (pieceAtPos) return { success: false, message: '目标位置已被占用' }; var oldX = caster.x; var oldY = caster.y; caster.x = pos.x; caster.y = pos.y; var baseDamage = Math.round(caster.attack * 1.2); var hit = []; battle.pieces.forEach(function(p) { if (p.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId || p.currentHp <= 0) return; var dx = Math.abs(p.x - pos.x); var dy = Math.abs(p.y - pos.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) <= 2) { var result = dealDamage(caster, p, baseDamage, 'true', battle, context.skill.id); hit.push(p.name + '(-' + result.damage + ')'); } }); var hitMsg = hit.length > 0 ? '，击中：' + hit.join('、') : '，周围无敌人'; return { success: true, message: caster.name + '时空跳跃至(' + pos.x + ',' + pos.y + ')' + hitMsg }; }
obito-space-time.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { var dmg = Math.round((piece.attack || 0) * 1.2); return { description: '传送至地图任意位置，对落点2格内敌人造成' + dmg + '点真实伤害（攻击力120%）', expectedValues: { damage: dmg } }; }

pulse-pistol-move.name: 脉冲手枪（移动触发）
pulse-pistol-move.description: 当敌人移动时，对自身Chebyshev距离≤2范围内随机1名敌人造成等同于攻击力的伤害
pulse-pistol-move.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.rulePiece; var enemy = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (!enemy) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (enemy.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var dx = Math.abs(enemy.x - caster.x); var dy = Math.abs(enemy.y - caster.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) > 2) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0 && Math.max(Math.abs(p.x - caster.x), Math.abs(p.y - caster.y)) <= 2; }); if (enemies.length === 0) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var target = enemies[Math.floor(Math.random() * enemies.length)]; var result = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, 'pulse-pistol-move'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的脉冲手枪触发，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }

pulse-pistol.name: 脉冲手枪
pulse-pistol.description: 敌人释放技能时，对5×5范围内随机一个敌人造成等同于自身攻击力的伤害
pulse-pistol.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.rulePiece; var enemy = context.sourcePiece; if (!caster) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (!enemy) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } if (enemy.ownerPlayerId === caster.ownerPlayerId) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var dx = Math.abs(enemy.x - caster.x); var dy = Math.abs(enemy.y - caster.y); if (Math.max(dx, dy) > 2) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var enemies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId && p.currentHp > 0 && Math.max(Math.abs(p.x - caster.x), Math.abs(p.y - caster.y)) <= 2; }); if (enemies.length === 0) { return { success: false, message: '' }; } var target = enemies[Math.floor(Math.random() * enemies.length)]; var result = dealDamage(caster, target, caster.attack, 'physical', battle, 'pulse-pistol'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的脉冲手枪触发，对' + target.name + '造成' + result.damage + '点伤害' }; }

rafaam-curse-amplify.name: 诅咒增幅
rafaam-curse-amplify.description: 将对手手牌中诅咒的行动点消耗改为10
rafaam-curse-amplify.code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const casterOwnerId = caster.ownerPlayerId; const opponentPlayer = battle.players.find(p => p.playerId !== casterOwnerId); if (!opponentPlayer || !opponentPlayer.hand) { return { success: false, message: '对手没有手牌' }; } let modifiedCount = 0; for (let card of opponentPlayer.hand) { if (card.name && card.name.includes('诅咒')) { card.actionPointCost = 10; modifiedCount++; } } if (modifiedCount === 0) { return { success: false, message: '对手手牌中没有诅咒' }; } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用诅咒增幅，将对手手牌中' + modifiedCount + '张诅咒的行动点消耗改为10' }; }
rafaam-curse-amplify.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '将对手手牌中所有诅咒的行动点消耗改为10' }; }

rafaam-curse-ward.name: 诅咒结界
rafaam-curse-ward.description: (被动)每回合限一次，该棋子在己方回合受到伤害时，免疫此伤害并将1张此次伤害量的诅咒（消耗2点AP来弃置，己方回合结束时使一个随机友方棋子受到记录的伤害）交给对手

rafaam-temporal-distortion-enemy.name: 时空扭曲-敌方减AP
rafaam-temporal-distortion-enemy.description: 在敌方回合开始时减少1点行动点
rafaam-temporal-distortion-enemy.code: function executeSkill(context) { var battle = context.battle; var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var contextPlayerId = context.playerId; if (!contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; if (currentPlayerId !== contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === contextPlayerId; }); if (!player) return { success: false }; if (!player.statusTags) player.statusTags = []; var enemyEffect = player.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'temporal-distortion-enemy'; }); if (!enemyEffect) return { success: false }; if (player.actionPoints > 0) { player.actionPoints -= 1; } player.statusTags = player.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type !== 'temporal-distortion-enemy'; }); return { success: true, message: '时空扭曲使敌方行动点-1' }; }

rafaam-temporal-distortion-self.name: 时空扭曲-自身加AP
rafaam-temporal-distortion-self.description: 在己方回合开始时增加1点行动点
rafaam-temporal-distortion-self.code: function executeSkill(context) { var battle = context.battle; var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var contextPlayerId = context.playerId; if (!contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; if (currentPlayerId !== contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === contextPlayerId; }); if (!player) return { success: false }; if (!player.statusTags) player.statusTags = []; var selfEffect = player.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); if (!selfEffect) return { success: false }; player.actionPoints += 1; player.statusTags = player.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type !== 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); return { success: true, message: '时空扭曲使自身行动点+1' }; }

rafaam-temporal-distortion-trigger.name: 时空扭曲触发
rafaam-temporal-distortion-trigger.description: 处理时空扭曲的效果：在玩家回合开始时检查statusTags并应用效果
rafaam-temporal-distortion-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { try { var battle = context.battle; var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var contextPlayerId = context.playerId; console.log('[rafaam-trigger] currentPlayerId:', currentPlayerId, 'contextPlayerId:', contextPlayerId); if (!contextPlayerId) return { success: false, message: 'No contextPlayerId' }; var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === contextPlayerId; }); if (!player) return { success: false, message: 'Player not found' }; console.log('[rafaam-trigger] Player found, statusTags:', JSON.stringify(player.statusTags)); if (!player.statusTags) player.statusTags = []; var enemyEffect = player.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'temporal-distortion-enemy'; }); var selfEffect = player.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); console.log('[rafaam-trigger] enemyEffect:', !!enemyEffect, 'selfEffect:', !!selfEffect); var message = ''; var effectTriggered = false; /* 如果是当前玩家的回合，且有selfEffect，加AP */ if (selfEffect && currentPlayerId === contextPlayerId) { player.actionPoints += 1; message += '时空扭曲使自身行动点+1'; effectTriggered = true; player.statusTags = player.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type !== 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); console.log('[rafaam-trigger] Self effect applied, AP+1'); } /* 如果是当前玩家的回合，且有enemyEffect，减AP */ if (enemyEffect && currentPlayerId === contextPlayerId) { if (player.actionPoints > 0) { player.actionPoints -= 1; message += '时空扭曲使行动点-1'; effectTriggered = true; } player.statusTags = player.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type !== 'temporal-distortion-enemy'; }); console.log('[rafaam-trigger] Enemy effect applied, AP-1'); } console.log('[rafaam-trigger] effectTriggered:', effectTriggered, 'message:', message); if (effectTriggered) { return { success: true, message: message }; } return { success: false, message: 'No effect triggered' }; } catch (e) { console.error('[rafaam-trigger] Error:', e.message); return { success: false, message: 'Error: ' + e.message }; } }

rafaam-temporal-distortion.name: 时空扭曲
rafaam-temporal-distortion.description: 对自身造成4点伤害，下一回合对方减少1点行动点，在自己的下一回合获得1个额外的行动点
rafaam-temporal-distortion.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var damageResult = dealDamage(caster, caster, 4, 'magical', battle, context.skill.id); var casterOwnerId = caster.ownerPlayerId; var enemyPlayerId = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId !== casterOwnerId; })?.playerId; if (!enemyPlayerId) return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用时空扭曲，对自身造成' + damageResult.damage + '点伤害' }; var selfPlayer = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === casterOwnerId; }); var enemyPlayer = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === enemyPlayerId; }); if (selfPlayer) { if (!selfPlayer.statusTags) selfPlayer.statusTags = []; selfPlayer.statusTags.push({ id: 'temporal-distortion-self-' + Date.now(), type: 'temporal-distortion-self', name: '时空扭曲-自身加AP', remainingDuration: 2 }); addPlayerRuleById(casterOwnerId, 'rule-rafaam-temporal-distortion'); } if (enemyPlayer) { if (!enemyPlayer.statusTags) enemyPlayer.statusTags = []; enemyPlayer.statusTags.push({ id: 'temporal-distortion-enemy-' + Date.now(), type: 'temporal-distortion-enemy', name: '时空扭曲-敌方减AP', remainingDuration: 2 }); addPlayerRuleById(enemyPlayerId, 'rule-rafaam-temporal-distortion'); } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用时空扭曲，对自身造成' + damageResult.damage + '点伤害，下回合敌方行动点-1，自己下回合行动点+1' }; }

recall-endturn-trigger.name: 回溯触发（回合结束）
recall-endturn-trigger.description: 对手回合结束时强制执行回溯
recall-endturn-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.recallData || battle.extensions.recallData.length === 0) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = battle.extensions.recallData.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var recall = battle.extensions.recallData[i]; if (context.playerId === recall.ownerPlayerId) continue; var piece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === recall.pieceId; }); if (piece && recall.snapshot) { piece.x = recall.snapshot.x; piece.y = recall.snapshot.y; piece.currentHp = Math.min(recall.snapshot.hp, piece.maxHp); if (recall.snapshot.shield !== undefined) piece.shield = recall.snapshot.shield; if (recall.snapshot.statusTags) piece.statusTags = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.statusTags)); if (recall.snapshot.buffs) piece.buffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.buffs)); if (recall.snapshot.debuffs) piece.debuffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.debuffs)); messages.push(piece.name + '回溯！（对手回合结束）'); triggered = true; } battle.extensions.recallData.splice(i, 1); } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }

recall-move-trigger.description: 对手移动时计数，达到目标时执行回溯
recall-move-trigger.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.recallData || battle.extensions.recallData.length === 0) return { success: false }; var actor = context.sourcePiece; if (!actor) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = battle.extensions.recallData.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var recall = battle.extensions.recallData[i]; if (actor.ownerPlayerId === recall.ownerPlayerId) continue; recall.actionCount = (recall.actionCount || 0) + 1; if (recall.actionCount >= recall.targetCount) { var piece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === recall.pieceId; }); if (piece && recall.snapshot) { piece.x = recall.snapshot.x; piece.y = recall.snapshot.y; piece.currentHp = Math.min(recall.snapshot.hp, piece.maxHp); if (recall.snapshot.shield !== undefined) piece.shield = recall.snapshot.shield; if (recall.snapshot.statusTags) piece.statusTags = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.statusTags)); if (recall.snapshot.buffs) piece.buffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.buffs)); if (recall.snapshot.debuffs) piece.debuffs = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(recall.snapshot.debuffs)); messages.push(piece.name + '回溯！（对手操作数达到' + recall.targetCount + '）'); triggered = true; } battle.extensions.recallData.splice(i, 1); } } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }

JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(caster.statusTags)) : [], buffs: caster.buffs ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(caster.buffs)) : [], debuffs: caster.debuffs ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(caster.debuffs)) : [] } }); battle.extensions.recallData = data; return { success: true, message: caster.name + '标记了回溯点，目标操作数：' + result }; }

rocket-punch.name: 火箭重拳
rocket-punch.description: 选择一个同行或同列的格子，向该方向冲刺3并对路径上的敌人造成伤害，停在第一个敌人或障碍物面前
rocket-punch.code: function executeSkill(context) { const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 5, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } if (sourcePiece.x !== targetPosition.x && sourcePiece.y !== targetPosition.y) { return { message: '目标格子必须与当前位置在同一行或同一列', success: false }; } let direction = ''; if (sourcePiece.x === targetPosition.x) { direction = targetPosition.y < sourcePiece.y ? 'up' : 'down'; } else { direction = targetPosition.x < sourcePiece.x ? 'left' : 'right'; } let hitEnemies = []; const damageValue = Math.round(sourcePiece.attack * context.skill.powerMultiplier); for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { let checkX = sourcePiece.x; let checkY = sourcePiece.y; switch (direction) { case 'up': checkY -= i; break; case 'down': checkY += i; break; case 'left': checkX -= i; break; case 'right': checkX += i; break; } const enemyAtCheck = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === checkX && p.y === checkY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId); if (enemyAtCheck) { hitEnemies.push(enemyAtCheck); } } let finalX = sourcePiece.x; let finalY = sourcePiece.y; for (let step = 1; step <= 3; step++) { let nextX = finalX; let nextY = finalY; switch (direction) { case 'up': nextY--; break; case 'down': nextY++; break; case 'left': nextX--; break; case 'right': nextX++; break; } const hasEnemy = battle.pieces.some(p => p.x === nextX && p.y === nextY && p.currentHp > 0); const isOutOfBounds = nextX < 0 || nextX >= battle.map.width || nextY < 0 || nextY >= battle.map.height; if (hasEnemy || isOutOfBounds) { break; } const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === nextX && t.y === nextY); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) { break; } finalX = nextX; finalY = nextY; } sourcePiece.x = finalX; sourcePiece.y = finalY; dealDamage(sourcePiece, hitEnemies, damageValue, 'physical', battle, context.skill.id); return { message: sourcePiece.name + ' 使用了火箭重拳，对路径上的敌人造成了伤害', success: true }; }
rocket-punch.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { const damageValue = Math.round(piece.attack * skillDef.powerMultiplier); return { description: '选择同行或同列的格子冲刺，对路径上的敌人造成' + damageValue + '点伤害(相当于攻击力200%)', expectedValues: { damage: damageValue, range: 5 } }; }

shadow-bolt.name: 暗影箭
shadow-bolt.description: 选择一个同行或同列的格子作为方向，消耗所有灵魂残片，向该方向射出暗影箭，对路径上所有敌方棋子造成攻击力100%+灵魂残片数量的伤害
shadow-bolt.code: function executeSkill(context) { var targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (targetPos && targetPos.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPos; } if (!targetPos || !targetPos.x) { return { success: false, message: '无效目标' }; } var caster = context.piece; var dx = targetPos.x - caster.x; var dy = targetPos.y - caster.y; if (dx !== 0 && dy !== 0) { return { success: false, message: '必须选择同行或同列的格子' }; } var battle = context.battle; var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); var soulFragments = []; if (player.hand) { for (var i = 0; i < player.hand.length; i++) { var card = player.hand[i]; if (card && card.cardId === 'soul-fragment') { soulFragments.push(card); } } } var fragmentCount = soulFragments.length; for (var j = 0; j < soulFragments.length; j++) { var fragment = soulFragments[j]; if (fragment && fragment.instanceId) { discardCard(fragment.instanceId); } } var dirX = dx === 0 ? 0 : (dx > 0 ? 1 : -1); var dirY = dy === 0 ? 0 : (dy > 0 ? 1 : -1); var damageValue = caster.attack + fragmentCount; var hitPieces = []; for (var k = 1; k <= 99; k++) { var checkX = caster.x + dirX * k; var checkY = caster.y + dirY * k; var target = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === checkX && p.y === checkY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.faction !== caster.faction; }); if (target) { dealDamage(caster, target, damageValue, 'magical', battle, context.skill.id); hitPieces.push(target.name); } } return { success: true, message: caster.name + '释放暗影箭！消耗' + fragmentCount + '个灵魂残片，对' + hitPieces.join('、') + '造成' + damageValue + '点伤害（攻击力+' + fragmentCount + '）' }; }
shadow-bolt.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择同行同列格子，消耗所有灵魂残片，对该方向所有敌人造成攻击力100%+灵魂残片数量伤害', expectedValues: {} }; }

shadow-step-teleport.name: 暗影步传送
shadow-step-teleport.description: 回合开始时传送到预设位置
shadow-step-teleport.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Executing shadow-step-teleport skill'); const sourcePiece = context.piece; console.log('[ShadowStep] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece ? sourcePiece.instanceId : 'null'); if (!sourcePiece.statusTags) { console.log('[ShadowStep] No statusTags, returning'); return { message: '', success: true }; } console.log('[ShadowStep] statusTags:', sourcePiece.statusTags.map(t => ({ type: t.type, remainingDuration: t.remainingDuration }))); const shadowStepStatus = sourcePiece.statusTags.find(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); console.log('[ShadowStep] shadowStepStatus:', shadowStepStatus); if (!shadowStepStatus) { console.log('[ShadowStep] No shadow-step status found, returning'); return { message: '', success: true }; } if (shadowStepStatus.remainingDuration <= 0) { console.log('[ShadowStep] remainingDuration <= 0, returning'); return { message: '', success: true }; } const targetX = shadowStepStatus.value; const targetY = shadowStepStatus.intensity; console.log('[ShadowStep] Target position:', targetX, targetY); const targetTile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === targetX && t.y === targetY); const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetX && p.y === targetY && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Target position occupied by', pieceAtPos.instanceId); targetTile.props.walkable = true; targetTile.props.shadowStepTarget = false; const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的暗影步目标位置已被占用', success: true }; } if (!targetTile) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Target tile not found'); const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的暗影步目标位置已不存在', success: true }; } console.log('[ShadowStep] Teleporting to', targetX, targetY); targetTile.props.walkable = true; targetTile.props.shadowStepTarget = false; sourcePiece.x = targetX; sourcePiece.y = targetY; shadowStepStatus.remainingDuration = 0; const index = sourcePiece.statusTags.findIndex(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (index !== -1) { sourcePiece.statusTags.splice(index, 1); } console.log('[ShadowStep] Teleport successful'); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '通过暗影步传送到了(' + targetX + ',' + targetY + ')', success: true }; }

shadow-step.name: 暗影步

shadow-step.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Executing shadow-step skill'); const sourcePiece = context.piece; console.log('[ShadowStep] sourcePiece:', sourcePiece ? sourcePiece.instanceId : 'null'); const targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 10, filter: 'all' }); console.log('[ShadowStep] targetPosition:', targetPosition); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } const tile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === targetPosition.x && t.y === targetPosition.y); console.log('[ShadowStep] tile:', tile ? 'found' : 'not found'); if (!tile || !tile.props.walkable) { return { message: '目标位置不可行走', success: false }; } const pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(p => p.x === targetPosition.x && p.y === targetPosition.y && p.currentHp > 0); if (pieceAtPos) { return { message: '目标位置已被占用', success: false }; } if (!sourcePiece.statusTags) { sourcePiece.statusTags = []; } const existingShadowStep = sourcePiece.statusTags.find(tag => tag.type === 'shadow-step'); if (existingShadowStep) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Updating existing shadow-step status'); const oldX = existingShadowStep.value; const oldY = existingShadowStep.intensity; const oldTile = battle.map.tiles.find(t => t.x === oldX && t.y === oldY); if (oldTile) { oldTile.props.walkable = true; oldTile.props.shadowStepTarget = false; } existingShadowStep.value = targetPosition.x; existingShadowStep.intensity = targetPosition.y; existingShadowStep.remainingDuration = 2; } else { console.log('[ShadowStep] Creating new shadow-step status'); sourcePiece.statusTags.push({ id: 'shadow-step-' + Date.now(), type: 'shadow-step', name: '暗影步', remainingDuration: 2, value: targetPosition.x, intensity: targetPosition.y, relatedRules: ['rule-shadow-step'] }); } tile.props.walkable = false; tile.props.shadowStepTarget = true; if (!sourcePiece.rules) { sourcePiece.rules = []; } const hasRule = sourcePiece.rules.some(r => r.id === 'rule-shadow-step'); console.log('[ShadowStep] hasRule:', hasRule); if (!hasRule) { console.log('[ShadowStep] Adding rule-shadow-step'); const result = addRuleById(sourcePiece.instanceId, 'rule-shadow-step'); console.log('[ShadowStep] addRuleById result:', result); } return { message: sourcePiece.name + '标记了暗影步位置，将在下回合开始时传送到(' + targetPosition.x + ',' + targetPosition.y + ')', success: true }; }

sleep-dart.name: 麻醉镖
sleep-dart.description: 选择一个格子，向该格子相对方向发射一个麻醉镖5格，如果有敌人则施加麻醉2回合
sleep-dart.code: function executeSkill(context) { var sourcePiece = context.piece; var targetPosition = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 5, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPosition || targetPosition.needsTargetSelection) { return targetPosition; } var targetX = targetPosition.x; var targetY = targetPosition.y; var sourceX = sourcePiece.x; var sourceY = sourcePiece.y; var dirX = targetX - sourceX; var dirY = targetY - sourceY; var maxSteps = 5; var stepX = 0; var stepY = 0; if (dirX !== 0) stepX = dirX > 0 ? 1 : -1; if (dirY !== 0) stepY = dirY > 0 ? 1 : -1; if (stepX === 0 && stepY === 0) { return { message: '无法向自身方向发射', success: false }; } for (var step = 1; step <= maxSteps; step++) { var checkX = sourceX + stepX * step; var checkY = sourceY + stepY * step; var targetPiece = select.getPieceAt(checkX, checkY); if (targetPiece && targetPiece.currentHp > 0) { var isEnemy = targetPiece.ownerPlayerId !== sourcePiece.ownerPlayerId; if (isEnemy) { var statusId = 'sleep-' + Date.now(); addStatusEffectById(targetPiece.instanceId, { id: statusId, type: 'sleep', currentDuration: 2, intensity: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-sleep-prevent-move', 'rule-sleep-prevent-skill', 'rule-sleep-remove-on-damage'] }); addRuleById(targetPiece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-move'); addRuleById(targetPiece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-skill'); addRuleById(targetPiece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-remove-on-damage'); addSkillById(targetPiece.instanceId, 'sleep-prevent'); addSkillById(targetPiece.instanceId, 'sleep-remove'); return { message: sourcePiece.name + '的麻醉镖命中' + targetPiece.name + '，使其进入麻醉状态2回合', success: true }; } } } return { message: '麻醉镖飞行5格但未命中敌人', success: true }; }
sleep-dart.previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '向选择方向发射麻醉镖，飞行5格，命中敌人则使其麻醉2回合（无法移动、无法使用技能直到受到伤害）', expectedValues: {} }; }

sleep-prevent.name: 麻醉阻止
sleep-prevent.description: 阻止被麻醉目标的移动和使用技能
sleep-prevent.code: function executeSkill(context) { console.log('=== sleep-prevent skill called ==='); console.log('context.piece:', context.piece ? context.piece.name : 'null'); if (!context.piece) { console.log('No piece in context'); return { message: '没有目标', success: false }; } console.log('context.piece.statusTags:', context.piece.statusTags); var isSleeping = false; if (context.piece.statusTags) { for (var i = 0; i < context.piece.statusTags.length; i++) { var tag = context.piece.statusTags[i]; console.log('Checking tag:', tag); if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'sleep') { isSleeping = true; console.log('Found sleep tag!'); break; } } } console.log('isSleeping:', isSleeping); if (isSleeping) { var actionType = '执行该操作'; if (context.type === 'beforeMove') { actionType = '移动'; } else if (context.type === 'beforeSkillUse') { actionType = '使用技能'; } console.log('Blocking action:', actionType); return { message: context.piece.name + '处于麻醉状态，无法' + actionType, success: true, blocked: true, showUIEffect: true }; } console.log('Not sleeping, action allowed'); return { message: '目标未处于麻醉状态或行动未被阻止', success: false }; }

sleep-remove.name: 麻醉解除
sleep-remove.description: 受到伤害时解除麻醉状态
sleep-remove.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!context.piece) { return { message: '没有目标', success: false }; } let sleepStatusIndex = -1; if (context.piece.statusTags) { for (let i = 0; i < context.piece.statusTags.length; i++) { const tag = context.piece.statusTags[i]; if (typeof tag === 'object' && tag.type === 'sleep') { sleepStatusIndex = i; break; } } } if (sleepStatusIndex !== -1) { context.piece.statusTags.splice(sleepStatusIndex, 1); removeRuleById(context.piece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-move'); removeRuleById(context.piece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-skill'); removeRuleById(context.piece.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-remove-on-damage'); removeSkillById(context.piece.instanceId, 'sleep-prevent'); removeSkillById(context.piece.instanceId, 'sleep-remove'); return { message: context.piece.name + '受到伤害，麻醉状态解除', success: true }; } return { message: '目标未处于麻醉状态', success: false }; }

sticky-bomb-explode.name: 粘性炸弹爆炸
sticky-bomb-explode.description: 粘性炸弹爆炸，对周围敌人造成伤害
sticky-bomb-explode.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.stickyBombs || battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length === 0) return { success: false }; var triggered = false; var messages = []; for (var i = battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { var bomb = battle.extensions.stickyBombs[i]; if (context.playerId === bomb.ownerPlayerId) continue; bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen = (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen || 0) + 1; if (bomb.opponentEndTurnsSeen < 1) continue; var targetX = bomb.x; var targetY = bomb.y; if (bomb.attachedPieceId) { var attachedPiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.instanceId === bomb.attachedPieceId && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (attachedPiece) { targetX = attachedPiece.x; targetY = attachedPiece.y; } } var affected = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.currentHp > 0 && Math.abs(p.x - targetX) + Math.abs(p.y - targetY) <= 1; }); if (affected.length > 0) { var result = dealDamage(sourcePiece, affected, bomb.damage, 'physical', battle, 'sticky-bomb'); var hitNames = affected.map(function(t, idx) { var dmg = result.results && result.results[idx] ? result.results[idx].damage : 0; return t.name + '(-' + dmg + ')'; }); messages.push('粘性炸弹爆炸！' + hitNames.join('、')); } else { messages.push('粘性炸弹爆炸！未命中任何棋子'); } battle.extensions.stickyBombs.splice(i, 1); triggered = true; } return triggered ? { success: true, message: messages.join('，') } : { success: false }; }

sticky-bomb-move.name: 粘性炸弹跟随
sticky-bomb-move.description: 当棋子移动时更新炸弹位置
sticky-bomb-move.code: function executeSkill(context) { if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.stickyBombs || battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length === 0) return { success: false }; var mover = context.sourcePiece; if (!mover) return { success: false }; var updated = false; for (var i = 0; i < battle.extensions.stickyBombs.length; i++) { var bomb = battle.extensions.stickyBombs[i]; if (bomb.attachedPieceId === mover.instanceId) { bomb.x = mover.x; bomb.y = mover.y; updated = true; } } return { success: false }; }

sticky-bomb.name: 粘性炸弹
sticky-bomb.description: 选择1格内一个格子放置炸弹，炸弹附着在格子上的棋子身上（如果有），对方回合结束时对周围造成7点伤害
sticky-bomb.code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 1, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var dist = Math.abs(pos.x - caster.x) + Math.abs(pos.y - caster.y); if (dist > 1) return { success: false, message: '目标超出范围（仅限相邻格）' }; var attachedPiece = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (!battle.extensions) { battle.extensions = {}; } if (!battle.extensions.stickyBombs) { battle.extensions.stickyBombs = []; } battle.extensions.stickyBombs.push({ x: pos.x, y: pos.y, damage: 7, ownerPlayerId: caster.ownerPlayerId, attachedPieceId: attachedPiece ? attachedPiece.instanceId : null, opponentEndTurnsSeen: 0 }); var msg = attachedPiece ? caster.name + '将粘性炸弹附着在' + attachedPiece.name + '身上！' : caster.name + '在(' + pos.x + ',' + pos.y + ')放置了粘性炸弹！'; return { success: true, message: msg }; }
